mapper.insert:
/* 로그인 로그 등록 LoginLogDAO.logInsertLoginLog */
INSERT INTO ${dbId}.COMTNLOGINLOG ( COMP_ID , CONECT_MTHD , CONECT_ID , CONECT_IP , ERROR_OCCRRNC_AT , ERROR_CODE , CREAT_DT , YEAR , MON , DAY , TIME ) VALUES (IFNULL(#{compId}, 'SESSION LOST') , #{loginMthd} , #{loginId} , #{loginIp} , #{errOccrrAt} , #{errorCode} , NOW() , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%m') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%d') , DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%H%i%s'))
mapper.select:
/* 로그인 로그 상세 조회 LoginLogDAO.selectLoginLog */
SELECT a.LOG_ID , a.CREAT_DT , a.CONECT_MTHD , a.CONECT_IP , a.CONECT_ID , b.USER_NM AS LOGIN_NM FROM COMTNLOGINLOG a LEFT OUTER JOIN V_ROLE_USER b ON a.CONECT_ID = b.USER_ID WHERE a.LOG_ID = #{logId}
/* 로그인 로그 총건수 LoginLogDAO.selectLogList */ SELECT COMP_ID, LOG_ID, CONECT_ID, CONECT_IP, CONECT_MTHD, ERROR_OCCRRNC_AT, ERROR_CODE, CREAT_DT, YEAR, MON, DAY, TIME FROM ${value}.comtnloginlog
